lab.title: 光軌 Style Laboratory
lab.releaseNotes: 目前共享 navigator 已補上可測核心規則與 node smoke tests，並完成本地 commit，但尚未推送 main 或觸發 GitHub Pages 部署。
lab.liveVerificationNotes: 已確認 GitHub Pages URL 可達，但目前線上頁面仍未反映這份本地工作樹的最新 lab 標題與 shared shell 變更。

versions.title: Orbit Cinematic
versions.concept: 把品牌首頁當成宇宙海報來閱讀，讓單一核心物件帶著文字與章節完成整頁敘事。
sourcePrinciples: Poster-first hero with one dominant visual anchor
Scroll phases that move the scene instead of just the document
Thin technical stack with explicit cleanup and deploy readiness
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 品牌發表頁 / 世界觀首頁
versions.bestFor: 第一次進實驗室時先理解世界觀型首頁的基線。
versions.navigationModel: 固定頂部導覽對應長頁章節
versions.motionLanguage: 高對比 orbital drift 與 section-driven camera shift
versions.narrativeStructure: 海報式 hero -> scroll narrative -> implementation stack -> archive closing
versions.sceneTreatment: 全頁舞台中央的單一 3D 主物件
notableUxIdeas: 單一核心物件隨頁面進度切換三種閱讀狀態
固定頁首導覽對應長頁面章節
以 reference archive 收束整頁，不讓結尾失焦
notableFeatureIdeas: research links embedded in the page narrative
performanceNotes: Scene teardown disposes geometry, materials, textures, env map, and renderer context.
Single-core geometry language avoids heavy model loading.

previewArtifacts.label: Orbit Cinematic poster preview
previewArtifacts.alt: v001 Orbit Cinematic 的概念海報預覽
previewArtifacts.origin: repo 內維護的向量海報預覽

versions.snapshotNotes: 目前只有概念海報預覽，這一輪尚未在 sandbox 內產生真實瀏覽器截圖。
versions.releaseNotes: 這份版本註冊與共享 browser shell 已完成本地 commit，但尚未推送 main 或觸發 GitHub Pages 部署。

versions.title: Signal Ledger
versions.concept: 把作品集首頁翻成可翻閱的編輯帳冊，讓版本、方法與研究來源一起成為主要內容。
sourcePrinciples: Editorial layout with fluid columns and strong reading rhythm
In-page navigation that keeps long-form pages scannable
Reduced-motion aware 3D ambiance instead of full-canvas spectacle
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 作品集索引 / 方法論首頁
versions.bestFor: 快速瀏覽版本治理、方法論與研究來源。
versions.navigationModel: 雜誌式頁首導覽與長文 section anchors
versions.motionLanguage: 低振幅 editorial drift 與溫和 reveal
versions.narrativeStructure: manifesto hero -> version collection -> lab method -> archive notes
versions.sceneTreatment: 被裁切為右側儀表面板的 3D ambience
notableUxIdeas: 把 style family 與 use-case 直接做成條目清單
方法區塊把 research -> distill -> generate -> validate 顯性化
把研究來源與版本治理拉進前台而不是藏在 README
notableFeatureIdeas: paper-toned layout with clipped 3D instrument panel
version registry surfaced in the global dock
journal-ready archive structure for future searchable browser
performanceNotes: Scene motion multipliers reduced for calmer editorial reading.
Canvas is visually clipped but still uses the same cleanup-safe renderer lifecycle.
No extra framework or component runtime added.

previewArtifacts.label: Signal Ledger poster preview
previewArtifacts.alt: v002 Signal Ledger 的概念海報預覽
previewArtifacts.origin: repo 內維護的向量海報預覽

versions.snapshotNotes: 目前只有概念海報預覽，這一輪尚未在 sandbox 內產生真實瀏覽器截圖。
versions.releaseNotes: 這份版本註冊與共享 browser shell 已完成本地 commit，但尚未推送 main 或觸發 GitHub Pages 部署。

versions.title: Museum Monograph
versions.concept: 把版本實驗室翻成策展型作品頁，讓 3D 核心物件像被置入展櫃的展件，文字則像 curator note、specimen register 與 study room。
sourcePrinciples: One dominant exhibit with metadata kept quiet and peripheral
Visible in-page wayfinding and skip paths for long-form reading
Framed WebGL presentation with restrained motion and explicit cleanup discipline
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 案例深讀頁 / 策展型作品展示
versions.bestFor: 深讀單一案例與版本家族關係。
versions.navigationModel: 左側固定 rail + 右側展件視窗的雙軸導覽
versions.motionLanguage: 展牌式 reveal 與 gallery drift
versions.narrativeStructure: curator note -> exhibition plates -> specimen register -> study room
versions.sceneTreatment: 被框進展櫃的 3D 展件
notableUxIdeas: 左側固定章節 rail，右側固定展櫃視窗，形成雙軸閱讀
把 performance notes 與 UX ideas 改寫成 specimen register
在 study room 內直接展示 version wall，而不只依賴外層 dock
notableFeatureIdeas: framed exhibit case around the shared three.js scene
monograph-style reading rhythm with dark gallery atmosphere
performanceNotes: Canvas remains on the shared renderer lifecycle with full teardown on version switch.
Motion multipliers are reduced to gallery drift and reduced-motion still collapses animation.
Framed presentation avoids expensive post-processing and keeps the 1.8 pixel ratio cap.
